channel.title: Maven Academy on Maven AI
channel.description: Recent content in Maven Academy on Maven AI

item.title: Academy Lessons
item.description:
Academy Lessons

🚧 Building in Public

The Maven Academy curriculum is being created as we learn. Lessons will be published weekly as real systems are built and documented.

Current status:

  • ✅ Academy framework established
  • ✅ Project Career roadmap documented
  • ✅ First agent workflow designed
  • 🔄 Lesson 1 in development

Coming Soon (Next 2 Weeks)

Lesson 1: What Is an AI Agent?

Topics:

  • Forget the hype — what agents actually are
  • Business logic + AI = agent
  • When to use agents vs. humans
  • Your mental model for building agents

Status: Writing now
